root_cause: Headline CVR flat (−0.08pp) masking −12.6% order shortfall (1,941→1,696). Google Ads campaign serving the kens-tours.antelope-canyon-tours.com subdomain was paused on May 7, 2026 — daily traffic collapsed from 200–260 users/day to effectively zero in two days. The subdomain carried ~11% CVR; its removal cost ~294 forgone orders. Data-derived finding matched the documented mitigation cause (Ken's Tours legal Cease & Desist) to the day. C2O independently improved on the remaining catalogue, masking the volume loss in the headline CVR.
